a:I[5878,["310","static/chunks/310-3f33d6a97cfc3ded.js","878","static/chunks/878-dbfa2cbdd3c38aab.js","537","static/chunks/app/concerts/%5Bslug%5D/page-b53e91132b9dacfa.js"],"Image"]
b:T6cb,<h1>BEYOND WORDS</h1><h3>One Sound. Many Worlds.</h3><p style="text-align: justify;">Get ready for an unforgettable night of electrifying performances, powerful rhythms, and musical energy that transcends borders.</p><p style="text-align: justify;">BEYOND WORDS brings together Grammy-winning violin maestro and global music legend&nbsp;<strong>Dr. L. Shankar</strong>, internationally acclaimed sitar virtuoso&nbsp;<strong>Samuel J. Dass</strong>, and an exceptional ensemble of musicians in a spectacular live music experience unlike anything you&#39;ve seen before.</p><p style="text-align: justify;">Taking place at the iconic&nbsp;<strong>Istana Budaya</strong>, this concert marks one of the first major international productions following the venue&#39;s extensive two-year refurbishment. Featuring a world-class acoustic environment and advanced sound technology inspired by leading international performance venues, the experience has been designed to deliver exceptional sound quality comparable to renowned concert halls such as London&#39;s&nbsp;<strong>Royal Albert Hall</strong>.</p><h3>Featuring</h3><p>&bull; Dr. L. Shankar &ndash; Violin &amp; Vocals<br>&bull; Samuel J. Dass &ndash; Sitar<br>&bull; Prakash Kandasamy &ndash; Tabla<br>&bull; Shawalnaz Hussin &ndash; Keyboards<br>&bull; Hadi Maswardi &ndash; Bass Guitar<br>&bull; Marco Alonso &ndash; Guitar<br>&bull; Eliezer Enan &ndash; Guitar<br><br></p><p>🔥 A rare live performance by Grammy-winning music legend L. Shankar</p><p>🔥 International Mastery Meets Malaysian Artistry</p><p>🔥 Powerful rhythms, breathtaking solos, and unforgettable musical moments</p><p>🔥 One stage. Multiple cultures. Endless energy.</p><h3>WHERE WORDS END, MUSIC BEGINS.</h3>e:{"d":"M8 2v4","key":"1cmpym"}
